info.name: Progress Module API Copy
info.description: Complete API collection for Progress Module with lazy-loading endpoints

item.name: Create progress for user (User creating own)

request.description: User creates progress for their own course. User ID must match authenticated user.
Returns all progresses sorted by creation date descending (newest first)
Get first page with 20 records per page
Sort by creation date ascending (oldest first)
Sort by creation date descending (newest first)
Sort by completion percentage ascending (0% → 100%)
Sort by completion percentage descending (100% → 0%)
Get only progresses with 100% completion
Get only progresses with <100% completion
Get progresses for specific user - replace {{user_id}} with actual user ObjectId
Get progresses for specific course - replace {{course_id}} with actual course ObjectId
Show students close to completing, sorted by highest percentage first
Show recently completed courses
Find specific user's courses in mid-progress range
See who started the course first
Identify at-risk students who started long ago but haven't progressed
Get a specific progress record. User can only view their own unless they're admin.
Get all progress records with pagination. Admin only.

item.name: Filter all progresses by userId (Admin only)

request.description: Filter all progresses by specific user. Admin only.
Get all progresses for a specific user. User can view own, admin can view any.
Get aggregated progress statistics. Admin only.

item.name: get progress by course and user id

request.description: Update any part of progress. Owner or admin only.
Delete a progress record. Admin only.
Initialize a section and all its lessons with practice sets. Owner or admin only.
Initialize a lesson with its practice sets. Automatically creates parent section if needed. Owner or admin only.
Initialize a practice set. Automatically creates parent section and lesson if needed. Owner or admin only.
Update lesson video watched state. Owner or admin only.
Mark a practice set as completed. Owner or admin only.

item.name: update final exam to be completed

request.description:
MCQ Question: 'What is the primary function of mitochondria in eukaryotic cells?'
Correct answer: Index 1 - 'ATP production through cellular respiration'
Expected: isCorrect: true, score: 1

MCQ Question: 'What is the primary function of mitochondria in eukaryotic cells?'
Wrong answer: Index 0 - 'Protein synthesis'
Expected: isCorrect: false, score: 0

Flash-Card Question - Pair 0
Front: Mitochondria
Back (correct): 'An organelle in eukaryotic cells that generates ATP through aerobic respiration. Often called the powerhouse of the cell. Contains its own DNA and can reproduce independently.'
Expected: isCorrect: true, score: 1

Flash-Card Question - Pair 1
Front: Chloroplast
Back (correct): 'Site of photosynthesis; converts light energy to chemical energy. Contains chlorophyll and thylakoid membranes.'
Expected: isCorrect: true, score: 1

Flash-Card Question - Wrong Answer
Front: Mitochondria
Back (wrong): 'Wrong definition here'
Expected: isCorrect: false, score: 0

Fill-Blank Question - All Correct
Blank 1: mitochondria (accepted: mitochondria, mitochondrion, mitochondrial)
Blank 2: ATP (accepted: ATP, adenosine triphosphate, energy)
Blank 3: DNA (accepted: DNA, genetic material, chromosomes)
Expected: isCorrect: true, score: 1

Fill-Blank Question - With Normalization
Testing case-insensitive matching
User answer: "MITOCHONDRIA" (uppercase)
Expected: isCorrect: true, score: 1 (because of normalization)

Fill-Blank Question - With Normalization
Testing whitespace trimming and case-insensitive matching
User answers: "  mitochondria  ", "atp", "genetic material"
Expected: isCorrect: true, score: 1 (because of normalization)

Fill-Blank Question - Partially Wrong
One blank is incorrect
Expected: isCorrect: false, score: 0 (all blanks must be correct)

Match Question - All Correct
Matching biological structures with their functions
Correct mapping: each item at index i maps to index i
Expected: isCorrect: true, score: 1

Match Question - Partially Wrong
Two pairs are swapped (indices 0 and 1)
Expected: isCorrect: false, score: 0 (all mappings must be correct)

Drag-Drop Question - All Correct
Dragging cell organelles to correct positions on cell diagram
Correct positions: Nucleus→1, Mitochondria→2, Ribosome→3, ER→4, Golgi→5
Expected: isCorrect: true, score: 1

Drag-Drop Question - Partially Wrong
Two organelles placed in wrong positions
Expected: isCorrect: false, score: 0 (all items must be in correct positions)

Test authentication requirement
No auth token provided
Expected: 401 - Authentication required

Test with invalid token
Expected: 401 - Invalid or expired token
Get a specific practice set with all questions
Get all practice sets for a specific practice bank
